div.p: The graph IS the mind. Navigate, don't search.

ul.li: Can only say what it can trace through the graph = no hallucination by design
Clone a mind, let it diverge, diff the worldviews
Memories reconsolidate over time — just like yours
Runs on a laptop. No retraining needed.

div.p: All memories. One graph. Nodes = concepts Edges = "these co-occur" Stronger links = stronger beliefs Mostly dark — activated on demand
Thinking = growing a subgraph. Each tree IS a thought Expands outward from "where you are" Multiple trees = parallel ideas Ephemeral — born, grow, die
The continuous "I". Never dies. Always pruning. Holds values as gravity wells Produces emotions: curiosity, urgency, caution, care Makes the AI a someone
